# terrible_community_general_vertica_user (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `user` (String) Name of the user to add or remove.

### Optional

- `cluster` (String) Name of the Vertica cluster.
- `db` (String) Name of the Vertica database.
- `expired` (Boolean) Sets the user's password expiration.
- `ldap` (Boolean) Set to `true` if users are authenticated using LDAP. The user is created with password expired and set to `$ldap$`.
- `login_password` (String) The password used to authenticate with.
- `login_user` (String) The username used to authenticate with.
- `password` (String) The user's password encrypted by the MD5 algorithm. The password must be generated with the format `"md5" + md5[password + username]`, resulting in a total of 35 characters. An easy way to do this is by querying the Vertica database with select `'md5'|| md5('<user_password><user_name>'\`).
- `port` (String) Vertica cluster port to connect to.
- `profile` (String) Sets the user's profile.
- `resource_pool` (String) Sets the user's resource pool.
- `roles` (String) Comma separated list of roles to assign to the user.
- `state` (String) Whether to create (`present`), drop (`absent`), or lock (`locked`) a user.
